response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable polyglot engineer with roughly 17 years of hands-on development experience across web, mobile, infrastructure, and embedded domains, and his recent work on MCP tooling and agentic workflows shows a genuine pivot toward AI. However, the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role is a director-level IC position requiring deep, demonstrated AI expertise, a track record of advising strategic enterprise customers, and the ability to shape cloud product strategy at scale — none of which are substantiated in the resume. His AI-relevant experience begins only in April 2025 (just over one year), there is no prior ML or AI platform background, no advanced degree, and no evidence of thought leadership or external advisory work at the seniority level this role demands.
strengths: ~17 years of broad engineering experience across multiple languages, platforms, and domains (web, mobile, embedded, high-throughput services)
Entrepreneurial track record via Northwind Labs (active since 2016) and multiple shipped open-source libraries with real-world adoption
Current role includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, demonstrating active investment in the AI space
concerns: AI/ML depth is minimal — substantive AI work begins only April 2025 with no prior machine learning, model deployment, or AI platform background
No evidence of director-level strategic advisory, customer-facing thought leadership, or cloud product strategy influence at enterprise scale
No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field, a preferred qualifier for this seniority, and the undergraduate degrees are not AI-focused
